note: OmniVoice frozen-conditioning preset — no fine-tune, no per-utterance training. The preset carries refText + instruct; encoded reference tokens are produced on demand by the FFI streaming path (encodeReference, ABI v4). The OmniVoice base LM weights and Kokoro-style WER/UTMOS evals do NOT apply to a preset publish; the only runtime-relevant metric is preset-load RTF.

gateResult.rationale: Preset is a metadata-only ELZ2 v2 file (refText + instruct + sample-id provenance). It encodes correctly via writeVoicePresetFileV2 and roundtrips via readVoicePresetFile (the freeze CLI asserts both before write). Runtime quality is determined by the OmniVoice base LM + the encodeReference call at inference time, not by this preset.
